data.name: billing.error.quote.notApproved
data.value: Quote must be APPROVED to perform this action.

data.name: billing.error.quote.duplicate
data.value: A quote already exists for this work order.

data.name: billing.error.quote.invalidState
data.value: Quote is in an invalid state for this operation.

data.name: billing.error.payment.conflict
data.value: Payment conflict. The amount may exceed the remaining balance or the voucher is already fully paid.

data.name: billing.error.facthub.unavailable
data.value: Facthub service is unavailable or returned an error.

data.name: billing.error.internal
data.value: An internal error occurred while processing the billing operation.
